title: export --target tla+/alloy/smv/promela
manager: Export a machine to the formal-methods languages researchers already use — TLA+, Alloy, SMV, Promela — so FSL becomes a bridge into the existing verification ecosystem rather than an island. The same lowerings that power the checker double as export targets, which means a formal-methods researcher can study an FSL machine in their own tools, and FSL benefits from their scrutiny in return.
cs: `export --target tla+|alloy|smv|promela`; reuses the backend lowerings (W8.3); the bridge for formal-methods researchers; a machine becomes studiable in established tools.
